reels.title: Olivier Schneider - Directing Action - Demo Reel 2026
reels.description:
Some of the most famous fights and action scenes in modern cinema were built by him. Most viewers have never heard his name.

Olivier Schneider — French stunt coordinator, fight choreographer, second unit director, director. 100+ films. From Besson to Bond. 

Multiple-time Taurus World Stunt Award winner: No Time to Die (2022) and nominated for Fast X (2024).

The reel below is what 30 years of practical craft looks like.

#OlivierSchneider #StuntCoordinator #ActionMovies #NoTimeToDie #FastX #demoreels #director

Recorded some more Voice Acting demos today.
Someone on Tik Tok said my Unicron was very close to Count Dooku impression so I really had to give it a proper go.

I've not watched a whole lot of Star Wars media outside of the Live Action movies, so everything I was saying were quotes from Wookiepedia.
In other words: I was winging it.

reels.title: Activity Classification using Motion History Images: A Computer Vision Demo Reel
reels.description:
A demo reel from an end-to-end classical computer vision project: classifying six human actions (walking, jogging, running, boxing, handwaving, handclapping) on the KTH dataset using Motion History Images and a random forest classifier.

The reel shows each action twice in succession: first the original video clip, then the same motion compressed into a Motion History Image where bright pixels represent recent motion and dim pixels represent older motion. The right pane is what the model actually sees.

The final two segments show the model's failure modes: a jogging clip predicted as walking (cadence-adjacent locomotion confusion), and a boxing clip predicted as handclapping (arm-action duality). Both are honest uncertainty at class boundaries rather than confident mistakes.

Project deta

reels.title: Kala Demo Reel
reels.description:
Kala is a Souls-like action game where you step into the role of Kala, a silent, broken warrior returning to his ancestral home, The Jiva Sanctum. This sacred nature sanctuary has been overrun and corrupted by a ruthless invader named Asur, whom you must confront to reclaim your homeland. 

As a player, you will experience a challenging, precision-based combat system that demands you to learn, adapt, and master defensive mechanics like frame-perfect parrying, blocking, and dodging. You will navigate through the weathered ruins of the Sanctum, facing coordinated groups of enemies.

Designed as a focused vertical slice, the project is a practical exploration of action-game design. Players will navigate a carefully crafted, multi-room environment, overcome environmental hazards, and battle th

reels.title: Luke Ha Stunt Reel 2026
reels.description:
Luke Ha is an MEAA graded Stunt Actor from Melbourne Australia. 

Coming from a gymnastics and circus background, Luke has worked extensively in the stunt industry in Australia and New Zealand, across a wide variety of mediums, including full feature films, TV series, commercials, short films, and music videos. Luke has acting training and experience and specialises in body control, fight choreography, break falls, high falls, stair falls, water and has performed many years in the circus industry prior to becoming a stunt performer. Luke has on-set experience with firearms, fire, wire gags, vehicles (motorbikes and cars).  

To see Luke’s credits see below

reels.title: 💥 Baaghi movie !! Hero Tiger Shroff Full Power Fight Reel 🚀
reels.description:
🔥 Tiger Shroff Dangerous Stunt Scene | Baaghi Movie Trending Status 🔥
अगर आपको एक्शन, स्टंट और दमदार एंट्री वाली मूवी पसंद है, तो Baaghi का यह खतरनाक स्टंट सीन आपके होश उड़ा देगा। 💥 इस वीडियो में Tiger Shroff का जबरदस्त एक्शन, फुल एनर्जी और शानदार फाइटिंग स्टाइल देखने को मिलेगा। उनकी स्पीड, पावर और खतरनाक स्टंट देखकर हर कोई हैरान रह जाता है। यही वजह है कि Baaghi मूवी के फाइट सीन आज भी लोगों के दिलों पर राज करते हैं। 🔥
इस स्टेटस वीडियो में आपको मिलेगा हाई लेवल एक्शन, दमदार बैकग्राउंड म्यूजिक और ऐसी एंट्री जो वीडियो को पूरी तरह सिनेमैटिक बना देती है। 🎬 Tiger Shroff ने अपने शानदार मार्शल आर्ट्स और खतरनाक स्टंट से इस सीन को और भी ज्यादा पावरफुल बना दिया है। हर पंच, हर किक और हर मूव में उनका अलग ही स्वैग देखने को मिलता है। 😈⚡
अगर आप Tiger Shroff के फैन हैं, तो यह वीडियो आपके लिए किसी सरप्
